description: Style Note Featuring your little girl's favourite toons, this tee from madagascar 3 is one she will not want to get out of. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat and helps keep dry. Pair it with a skirt and sandals for sunny days and layer on a jacket for chilly evenings. Product Description Pink single jersey knit t-shirt, print on front, round neck with overlocked frills, gathered cap sleeve with binding, elasticated smocking at hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours Medium iron Do not iron on print
